## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash install.sh` runs cleanly
- [ ] Command tested against at least two real projects (new commands and improvements)
- [ ] `npm run build` in `site/` completes with zero errors
- [ ] Docs page created or updated to match the command's phases
- [ ] Sidebar entry added/updated in `site/astro.config.mjs`
- [ ] Landing page card added/updated in `site/src/content/docs/index.mdx`
- [ ] Install page updated in `site/src/content/docs/install.mdx`
- [ ] README updated (phase table, framework list, project structure tree)
- [ ] No CONTEXT.md, `.env`, or personal config files in the diff
